error-board-notAdmin: Kudingeka ube admin waleli bhodi ukuze wenze lokho

error-json-schema: Idatha yakho ye-JSON ayifaki ulwazi olufanele ngefomethi elungile
error-csv-schema: I-CSV(Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngokhefana)/TSV (Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngethebhu) ayifaki ulwazi olufanele ngefomethi efanele.
error-import-empty-board: Iyi export a i na zwidzhena zwa bodo (a hu na swimlane, mitevhe kana makhaḓi). Zwi nga vha zwo sikwa nga vheshini ya kale ya WeKan i re na vhukhakhi ha export vhu ḓivheaho. Ni humbelwa u dovha ni bvisele nnda bodo nga vheshini ya zwino nahone ni dzhenise faela iṱswa.
error-linked-card-not-allowed: Ni nga sokou ita link kha khaḓi ḽa nga ho. U ita link kha ḽiṅwe khaḓi ḽo linkwaho, kana kha khaḓi ḽi linkaho murahu kha ḽino bodo, a zwi tendelwi ngauri zwi nga ita uri makhaḓi a sa kone u swikelelwa.
error-user-disabled: Akhaunthu iyi ya mushumisi yo dzimiwa
export-card-field-dates: Amadethi (Okudaliwe, Okwamukelwe, Okuqala, Okufanele, Okuphela Ngayo)
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Ayikwazi ukuthekelisa ku-Excel: asikho isikhala esanele sediski samahhala
filter-on-desc: Uhlunga amakhadi kuleli bhodi. Chofoza lapha ukuze uhlele isihlungi.
advanced-filter-description: Isihlungi Esithuthukisiwe sivumela ukubhala iyunithi yezinhlamvu equkethe ama-opharetha alandelayo: == != <= >= && || ( ) Isikhala sisetshenziswa njengesihlukanisi phakathi kwama-Opharetha. Ungakwazi ukuhlunga zonke izinkambu ngokwezifiso ngokuthayipha amagama azo kanye namanani. Isibonelo: Inkundla1 == Inani1. Qaphela: Uma izinkambu noma amanani equkethe izikhala, udinga ukuwahlanganisa zibe izingcaphuno ezizodwa. Isibonelo: 'Inkambu 1' == 'Inani 1'. Ukuze izinhlamvu zokulawula okukodwa (' \/) zeqiwe, ungasebenzisa \. Isibonelo: I-Field1 == I\'m. Futhi ungakwazi ukuhlanganisa izimo eziningi. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ngokuvamile bonke opharetha bahunyushwa kusukela kwesokunxele kuya kwesokudla. Ungashintsha i-oda ngokubeka amabakaki. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Futhi ungasesha izinkambu zombhalo usebenzisa i-regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
imported-member-no-account: Muraḓo o dzheniswaho — a hu athu vha na akhaunthu i teaho
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Nambatedza Kanboard export JSON: tshithu tshi re na "columns" (kana mishumo i hwalaho column_name) na tshiṱaka "tasks" (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns dzi vha mitevhe nahone mishumo i vha makhaḓi.
import-board-instruction-deck: Nambatedza NextCloud Deck board JSON (bodo ḽi re na "stacks", stack iṅwe na iṅwe i hwala "cards" dzayo). Stacks dzi vha mitevhe nahone makhaḓi a vha makhaḓi.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Nambatedza OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses dzi vha mitevhe nahone work packages dzi vha makhaḓi.
import-board-instruction-issues: Nambatedza __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues dzi vha makhaḓi o dzudzanywaho kha mitevhe ya Open / Closed.
import-board-instruction-asana: Nambatedza Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } u bva kha Asana export kana GET /tasks). Mishumo yo dzudzanywa kha zwipiḓa (memberships); mishumo yo fhelaho i ya kha Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Nambatedza ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages dzi vha mitevhe nahone items dzi vha makhaḓi.
import-board-instruction-trello: Ebhodini lakho le-Trello, hamba ku-'Menu', bese uthi 'Okwengeziwe', 'Printa futhi Khipha', 'Khipha i-JSON', bese ukopisha umbhalo owumphumela.
import-board-instruction-csv: Namathisela Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngokhefana(CSV)/ Ithebhu Amanani Ahlukaniswe (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Nambatedza JSON u bva kha Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), kana tshithu tshi eḓanaho { "issues": [...] }. Jira statuses dzi vha mitevhe nahone issues dzi vha makhaḓi. Arali ni tama, dzhenisani array ya "automationRules" u itela u dzhenisa milayo.
import-board-instruction-excel: Khetha spreadsheet ya WeKan ya .xlsx (columns dzi fanaho na Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, madatumu, custom fields). Mutalo wa u thoma ndi ṱhoho.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Ebhodini lakho, hamba 'kumenyu', bese 'Khipha ibhodi', bese ukopisha umbhalo efayeleni elilandiwe.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Uma uthola amaphutha lapho ungenisa ibhodi, ngezinye izikhathi ukungenisa kusasebenza, futhi ibhodi isekhasini Wonke Amabhodi.
import-without-mapping-members: Dzhenisa hu si na u mepa miraḓo (mepa nga murahu)
import-json-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-JSON lapha
import-csv-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-CSV/TSV lapha
import-json-file: Kana khetha faela ya Trello JSON
import-attachments-zip: Trello attachments ZIP (a i ṱhogei, u bva kha Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: Bodo ḽithihi ḽa Trello ḽo bviselwaho nnda sa .json. Arali no vhulunga Trello API key na token, zwo namaṱheliswaho zwaḽo, murahu wa bodo na avatar dza miraḓo na zwone zwi a downloadwa.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: A .zip i re na faela nthihi kana nnzhi dza bodo dza .json na zwo namaṱheliswaho zwadzo kha thumba dza madzina a bodo (u bva kha Trello Card Attachments Downloader). Mabodo oṱhe a a dzheniswa.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: A hu na faela dza bodo dza Trello .json dzo wanwaho kha .zip.
import-trello-zip-progress: Hu khou dzheniswa mabodo u bva kha .zip, ni humbelwa u lindela…
import-trello-failed: U dzhenisa u bva kha Trello zwo kundelwa.
import-trello-zip-read-failed: A zwo konadzea u vhala .zip yo layishwaho.
import-trello-zip-too-large: Iyi .zip ndi khulwane vhukuma uri i dzheniswe.
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: Iyi .zip i na faela nnzhi vhukuma uri dzi dzheniswe.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: Faela nthihi ngomu kha .zip ndi khulwane vhukuma uri i dzheniswe.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: Iyi .zip i na dziṋḓila dza faela dzi si na tsireledzo nahone yo hanelwa.
import-trello-workspace: Dzina ḽa workspace ya muṋe (a ḽi ṱhogei)

import-trello-parent-workspace: Vhea workspaces dzo dzheniswaho fhasi ha

trello-api-import-desc: Nambatedza API key na token yaṋu ya Trello u itela u sumbedza workspaces na mabodo aṋu a Trello, nga zwenezwo dzhenisa o nangiwaho na zwo namaṱheliswaho zwao.
trello-api-key: Trello API key (u bva kha https://trello.com/app-key)
trello-api-token: Trello API token (yo bveledzwaho nga tshanḓa fhasi ha API key)

globalSearch-instructions-description: Usesho lungabandakanya ama-opharetha ukuze acwenge ukusesha.  Ama-opharetha acaciswa ngokubhala igama lomsebenzisi nenani elihlukaniswe koloni.  Isibonelo, ukucaciswa komsebenzisi kokuthi `list:Blocked` kungakhawulela ukusesha kumakhadi aqukethwe ohlwini oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe*.  Uma inani liqukethe izikhala noma izinhlamvu ezikhethekile kufanele lifakwe kuzimpawu zokucaphuna (isb. `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​amakhadi okumele akhokhe kufike ezinsukwini *<n>* kusukela manje.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ ubala wonke amakhadi adlule usuku lwawo lomnqamulajuqu.
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​wonke amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando nangafakwanga kungobo yomlando
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​lapho *<field>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` noma `__predicate_member__`.  Ukubeka okuthi `-` ngaphambi kokuthi *<field>* kusesha ukungabikho kwevelu kuleyo nkambu (isb. `has:-due` usesha amakhadi ngaphandle kwedethi yamanqamu).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​lapho *<sort-name>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` noma `__predicate_modified__`.  Ukuze uthole uhlobo olwehlayo, beka `-` ngaphambi kwegama lokuhlunga.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​lapho *<n>* iyinani eliphelele elibonisa inombolo yamakhadi azoboniswa ekhasini ngalinye.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Ama-opharetha afanayo *NOMA* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nanoma yimiphi imibandela azobuyiswa.
U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` uzobuyisela amakhadi aqukethwe kunoma yiluphi uhlu oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe* noma *Okutholakalayo*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ama-opharetha ahlukene *FUTHI* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nawo wonke ama-opharetha ahlukene abuyiselwayo.  U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` ubuyisela amakhadi kuphela ohlwini *Okutholakalayo* anelebula *elibomvu*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Izinsuku zingacaciswa njengenombolo ephozithivu noma enegethivu noma kusetshenziswa okuthi `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` noma `__predicate_year__` esikhathini samanje.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Ngokuzenzakalelayo amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando awaseshwa.

mongodb-compact-description: Nga murahu ha u pfukisela faela u bva kha MongoDB GridFS, faela ya database kha disiki a i tsheneli nga u aṱo. U shumisa Compact zwi humisa tshikhala tsho vhofhololwaho nga u ṅwala hafhu data ya collection. Shumisa hezwi fhedzi nga murahu ha musi u pfukisa faela nnzhi ho fhela.
mongodb-compact-warning: Ṱhogomela: Compact ndi mushumo u thivhelaho une wa nga dzhia mineti minzhi kha database khulwane. Kha replica sets, secondaries dzoṱhe dzi compactiwa u thoma (nga u aṱo), nga zwenezwo primary. Kha single-node replica sets dzi shumiselwaho oplog (Meteor setup i ḓoweleaho), ndi primary fhedzi ine ya compactiwa.
mongodb-compact-running: Hu khou shuma compact, hezwi zwi nga dzhia mineti minzhi...
mongodb-compact-success: Compact yo fhela. Collections dzo compactiwaho:
invalid-file: Uma igama lefayela lingavumelekile, ukulayisha noma ukuqamba kabusha kukhanseliwe.
preview-pdf-not-supported: Idivayisi yakho ayikusekeli ukuhlola kuqala i-PDF. Zama ukulanda esikhundleni salokho.
drag-board-to-workspace: Hudula ibhodi ukuze unikeze u-__workspaces__ (yehlisa indawo yokusebenza kubha eseceleni)
translation-number: Inombolo yeyunithi yezinhlamvu zokuhumusha ngokwezifiso ithi:
delete-translation-confirm-popup: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lolu chungechunge lokuhumusha ngokwezifiso? Akukho ukuhlehlisa.
import-board-zip: Engeza ifayela le-.zip elinamafayela ebhodi e-JSON, neziqondiso ezingaphansi zamagama ebhodi anezinamathiselwa
support-info-only-for-logged-in-users: Ulwazi losekelo olwabasebenzisi abangene ngemvume kuphela.
accounts-lockout-info: Lezi zilungiselelo zilawula ukuthi imizamo yokungena ivikelwa kanjani ekuhlaselweni ngenkani.
accounts-lockout-known-users: Izilungiselelo zabasebenzisi abaziwayo (igama lomsebenzisi elilungile, iphasiwedi engalungile)
accounts-lockout-locked-users-info: Abasebenzisi okwamanje bavalelwe ngaphandle ngenxa yemizamo eminingi ehlulekile yokungena ngemvume
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula lo msebenzisi?
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock-all: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula bonke abasebenzisi abakhiyiwe?
admin-people-user-inactive: Umsebenzisi akasebenzi - chofoza ukuze wenze kusebenze
add-cron-job-placeholder: Engeza umsebenzi Ohleliwe Womsebenzi uyeza maduze
attachments-path-description: Indlela lapho amafayela okunamathiselwe agcinwa khona
avatars-path-description: Indlela lapho amafayela e-avatar agcinwa khona
cron-job-delete-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lo msebenzi ohleliwe?
filesystem-enabled-description: Shumisa filesystem ya hayani u vhulunga faela
s3-minio-storage-description: Vhuvhulungo ha zwithu vhu tshimbidzanaho na S3: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces na zwiṅwe.
s3-force-path-style: Kombetshedza URLs dza sitaela ya nḓila
s3-force-path-style-description: Zwi ṱoḓiwa nga MinIO na vhunzhi ha maseva a si a AWS a tshimbidzanaho na S3.
azure-connection-string-description: A zwi ṱhogei: shumisa connection string yo fhelelaho u fhira dzina ḽa akhaunthu na khie.
database-migration-description: Pfulusela data ya maṅwalwa (zwoṱhe nga nnḓa ha zwo namaṱheliswaho na avatar, zwine zwa sala kha filesystem) vhukati ha MongoDB na FerretDB v1 (SQLite). Iṅwe database i tea u vha i tshi khou shuma nahone i tshi swikelelwa (maphothi a mvelaphanḓa: FerretDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018, MongoDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27019; shandula nga WEKAN_FERRETDB_URL / WEKAN_MONGODB_URL). Nga murahu ha musi ho fhela, sedzisa MONGO_URL kha iṅwe database nahone thoma hafhu WeKan (kha Snap: snap set wekan database=ferretdb kana =mongodb).
database-migrate-to-ferretdb: Pfulusela data ya maṅwalwa kha FerretDB v1 (SQLite)
database-migrate-to-mongodb: Pfulusela data ya maṅwalwa kha MongoDB
database-migration-confirm: Kopolola collections dzoṱhe dza maṅwalwa kha __db__? Zwo namaṱheliswaho na avatar kha filesystem a zwi kwamei. Database ya u swikela i tea u vha i tshi khou shuma.
database-migration-done: U pfulusela data ya maṅwalwa ho fhela.
sandstorm-migration-description: Musi WeKan i tshi shuma ngomu kha Sandstorm grain, database yayo ya kale ya MongoDB 3 i pfuluselwa kha FerretDB v1 (SQLite) kha u thoma u vulwa, nahone zwo namaṱheliswaho na avatar zwi pfuluselwa u bva kha database zwi ya kha thumba dza grain dza files/attachments na files/avatars. Hezwi zwi sumbedza arali u pfulusela ho bvelela nahone tshikhala tshingafhani tsha disiki tshine faela ya kale ya raw ya MongoDB database tshi tshi ḓi shumisa ngomu kha grain, nahone zwi ni tendela u thutha faela idzo dza raw u itela u vhofholola tshikhala.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb: Faela dza raw dza MongoDB 3 database
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb: Thutha faela dza raw dza MongoDB database
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-description: Nga murahu ha u pfulusela ho bvelelaho data i dzula kha FerretDB na kha filesystem, ngauralo faela dza kale dza raw dza MongoDB 3 database dzi nga thuthiwa u itela u vhofholola tshikhala tsha disiki ya grain. Hezwi a zwi nga vhuyedzwi.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-confirm: Thutha faela dza raw dza MongoDB 3 database u itela u vhofholola tshikhala tsha disiki? Data yo no pfuluselwa kha FerretDB na kha filesystem. Hezwi a zwi nga vhuyedzwi.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb-deleted: Faela dza raw dza MongoDB database dzo thuthiwa, ho vhofhololwa
cards-loading-description: Nḓila ine bodo ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa layisha makhaḓi aḽo. Makhaḓi oṱhe: khaḓi ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi layishelwa kha buraweza (zwa u leluwa, zwiitwa zwoṱhe zwi a shuma, fhedzi bodo ḽi re na maḓana a makhaḓi ḽi rumela data nnzhi kha muvhoni muṅwe na muṅwe). Lazy: mutevhe muṅwe na muṅwe u layisha fhedzi makhaḓi a vhonalaho zwino (infinite scroll) na muvhalo u tshilaho, ngauralo mabodo mahulwane vhukuma a shumisa memori na bandwidth i ṱhukhu. Zwi dovha zwa vhewa nga CARDS_LOADING environment variable.
cards-loading-lazy-note: U layisha makhaḓi nga lazy ndi zwa u lingwa: dzikhaunthara dza makhaḓi na WIP limits ndi dza vhukuma, fhedzi Calendar/Table/Gantt views na multi-select zwi sumbedza fhedzi makhaḓi o layishwaho u swika zwino. Layisha hafhu mabodo o vulwaho nga murahu ha u shandula hezwi.
render-links-as-plain-text-description: Musi zwo vulwa, dzilinki dzoṱhe (zwivhili markdown links dzi ngaho [label](url) na raw HTML <a href> tags) dzi dzula dzi tshi sumbedzwa sa maṅwalwa fhedzi, a dzi puṱedzei kha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshiṱaka tsha maṅwalwa (dzithero na ṱhalutshedzo dza bodo na khaḓi, mibono, tshekilisiti, na zwiṅwe). Hezwi zwi thivhela dzilinki dzi xedzaho dzi puṱedzeaho. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa, ngauralo dzilinki dzi dzula dzi tshi puṱedzea.
always-show-code-as-text: Sumbedza misi yoṱhe khoudu yoṱhe sa maṅwalwa fhedzi
always-show-code-as-text-description: Musi zwo vulwa, maṅwalwa a rich text a hongo sumbedzwa sa markdown kana HTML: tshiko tshoṱhe tshi dzula tshi tshi sumbedzwa sa maṅwalwa fhedzi kha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshiṱaka tsha maṅwalwa (dzithero na ṱhalutshedzo dza bodo na khaḓi, mibono, tshekilisiti, na zwiṅwe). Hezwi zwi bvisela khagala zwidzhena zwo dzumbiwaho — HTML comments (<!-- -->), tshine markdown links tsha nanga, JavaScript na iṅwe khoudu iṅwe na iṅwe — ngauralo khoudu yoṱhe i dzula i tshi vhonala, a i puṱedzei, nahone a i shumi. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa, ngauralo markdown i sumbedzwa nga ho teaho.
disable-all-import-description: Musi zwo vulwa, zwiitwa zwoṱhe zwa u dzhenisa zwi a dzimiwa: u dzhenisa bodo u bva kha WeKan JSON, Trello, CSV/Excel, Jira, Kanboard, NextCloud Deck, OpenProject, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea na Forgejo, na u kopa bodo. Zwikhetho zwa menyu ya u dzhenisa zwi a dzumbiwa nahone seva i hana khumbelo iṅwe na iṅwe ya u dzhenisa. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-all-export-description: Musi zwo vulwa, zwiitwa zwoṱhe zwa u bvisela nnda zwi a dzimiwa: u bvisela nnda bodo sa WeKan JSON, CSV, Excel, Kanboard, kana kha NextCloud Deck / OpenProject / GitHub / GitLab / Gitea / Forgejo, na u bvisela nnda tsho namaṱheliswaho tshithihi. Zwikhetho zwa menyu ya u bvisela nnda zwi a dzumbiwa nahone seva i hana khumbelo iṅwe na iṅwe ya u bvisela nnda. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-import-avatars-description: Musi zwo vulwa, avatar (zwifanyiso zwa phurofaela ya vhashumisi) a zwi dzheniswi. Hezwi zwi katela u dzhenisa WeKan JSON, u dzhenisa Trello, na u ṱanganyisa avatar u bva kha vhaṋei vha vhuḓivhi vha nnḓa kha u dzhena (LDAP, OIDC/OAuth2). Madzina na iṅwe data zwi kha ḓi dzheniswa; ndi avatar fhedzi dzi fhiraho. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-export-avatars-description: Musi zwo vulwa, avatar (zwifanyiso zwa phurofaela ya vhashumisi) a zwi katelwi musi u tshi bvisela nnda bodo (WeKan JSON na CSV export). Madzina a vhashumisi na iṅwe data zwi kha ḓi bviselwa nnda; ndi avatar fhedzi dzi siiwaho. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
anonymize-import-users: Dzumba madzina a vhashumisi vha u dzhenisa
anonymize-import-users-description: Musi zwo vulwa, u dzhenisa bodo ḽa WeKan JSON zwi imelela dzina ḽa mushumisi muṅwe na muṅwe o dzheniswaho, dzina ḽoṱhe na maletere a u thoma nga zwiimela zwa muvhalo (user1, user2, ...), zwi bvisa avatar yawe, nahone zwi ṅwala hafhu @username mentions (na masimu a requested-by / assigned-by) ngomu kha zwidzhena zwa khaḓi na mbono zwo dzheniswaho. A hu na vhuṋe ha mushumisi ha vhukuma u bva kha bodo ḽa tshiko ḽo vhulungwaho. Ipfi "user" ḽi tevhela luambo lwa muthu ane a khou dzhenisa. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
anonymize-export-users: Dzumba madzina a vhashumisi vha u bvisela nnda
anonymize-export-users-description: Musi zwo vulwa, u bvisela nnda bodo zwi imelela dzina ḽa mushumisi muṅwe na muṅwe o bviselwaho nnda, dzina ḽoṱhe na maletere a u thoma nga zwiimela zwa muvhalo (user1, user2, ...), zwi bvisa avatar yawe, nahone zwi ṅwala hafhu @username mentions (na masimu a requested-by / assigned-by) ngomu kha zwidzhena zwa khaḓi na mbono. Faela yo bviselwaho nnda a i na vhuṋe ha mushumisi ha vhukuma. Ipfi "user" ḽi tevhela luambo lwa muthu ane a khou bvisela nnda. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-activities-description: Musi zwo vulwa, zwidzhena zwa u phakela mishumo a zwi ṅwaliwi nahone a zwi sumbedzwi naho ngafhi (bara ya bodo na thebe ya mishumo ya khaḓi). A hu na ḓivhazwakale ha uri ndi nnyi o itaho mini. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-notifications-description: Musi zwo vulwa, WeKan a i rumeli zwidivhadzo zwa u ṱhogomela (kha app, email kana tshiṅwe tshumelo) kha mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe. Mishumo i kha ḓi ṅwaliwa (arali i songo dzimwa nga nṱha); ndi zwidivhadzo fhedzi zwine zwa dzimiwa. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
disable-watch-description: Musi zwo vulwa, tshiitwa tsha u lavhelesa tshi a dzimiwa — vhashumisi a vha koni u ṱumela kha mabodo, mitevhe kana makhaḓi u itela u ṱanganedza zwidivhadzo, nahone lingedzo ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa u shandula levele ya u lavhelesa ḽi a hanelwa. Mvelaphanḓa yo dzimwa.
backup-description: Ita bakapu ya Zwo Namaṱheliswaho, Avatar na/kana Data (collections dzoṱhe dza maṅwalwa dzi si dzo namaṱheliswaho kana avatar). .zip i rumelwa nga u ṱavhanya kha vhuvhulungo ho nangiwaho — hu si na faela ya tshifhinganyana — sa backup/YYYY/MM/DD/HH_MM_SS/backup.zip, i re na YYYY_MM_DD-HH_MM_SS/attachments, /avatars na /data. Vhuvhulungo ha cloud (S3/MinIO, Azure, GCS) vhu shumisa credentials dzo dzudzanywaho kha dzithebe dzavho dza vhuvhulungo.
backup-restore-select-first: Nanga bakapu u bva kha mutevhe u thoma.
backup-restore-confirm: Vhuyedza bakapu yo nangiwaho? Zwo namaṱheliswaho/avatar zwi ṅwalwa kha filesystem nahone data kha database u ya nga modo yo nangiwaho.
gcs-key-filename: Nḓila ya faela ya khie ya service account
gcs-key-filename-description: A zwi ṱhogei: nḓila ya faela ya khie ya JSON ya service account kha seva.
gcs-credentials-description: A zwi ṱhogei: nambatedza khie ya JSON ya service account. Sia hu si na tshithu u itela u shumisa faela ya khie kana credentials dza mvelaphanḓa.
gcs-permissions-note: Ṋea service account ya WeKan pfanelo ya u vhala/u ṅwala kha bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → bucket yaṋu → Permissions → Grant access. Kha "New principals", nambatedza email ya service account — vhuci ha "client_email" u bva kha khie yaṋu ya JSON — nga zwenezwo khetha mushumo "Storage Object Admin" nahone Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Sia hu si na tshithu u itela u dzula na vhuci ha zwino.
azure-account-name-description: Dzina ḽa akhaunthu yaṋu ya Azure Storage.
azure-container-description: Blob container ya u vhulunga faela.
gcs-project-id-description: Project id yaṋu ya Google Cloud.
gcs-bucket-description: Dzina ḽa bucket ya Cloud Storage ya u vhulunga faela.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: sia hu si na tshithu (i shumisa endpoint ya vundu). S3-compatible: Endpoint URL u bva kha console yaṋu ya MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → bucket yaṋu → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → dzina ḽa bucket yaṋu (kana Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → mushumisi waṋu → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → khetha use case 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Yo sumbedzwaho sa 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Tshikirini tshi fanaho na Access key ID; 'Secret access key' i sumbedzwa luthihi fhedzi musi khie i tshi sikwa — i kopolole nga tshenetsho tshifhinga (kana Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akhaunthu yaṋu → dzina ḽo sumbedzwaho nṱha (na fhasi ha Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akhaunthu yaṋu → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akhaunthu yaṋu → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akhaunthu yaṋu → Data storage → Containers → container yaṋu (kana + Container u sika iṅwe).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → project selector nṱha → ID ya project yaṋu (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → dzina ḽa bucket yaṋu (kana Create u sika iṅwe).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Nḓila kha seva ya WeKan ya faela ya khie ya JSON ya service account yo downloadwaho (yo sikwaho nga fhasi). Shumisa hei KANA nambatedza JSON kha tshiṱaka nga fhasi.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → service account yaṋu → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (i downloada faela). Nambatedza zwidzhena zwayo hafha, kana vhulunga faela nahone vhea nḓila yayo nṱha.
cloud-secret-set: (yo vhulungwa — sia hu si na tshithu u dzula nayo)
cloud-settings-save-failed: Zwo kundelwa u vhulunga nzudzanyo ya vhuvhulungo
attachment-move-storage-azure: Pfukisela tsho namaṱheliswaho kha Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Pfukisela tsho namaṱheliswaho kha Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-MongoDB GridFS ukuze ugcine ifayela
migration-stop-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukumisa konke ukufuduka?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: U itela uri zwo namaṱheliswaho na avatar zwi vhonale, zwi pfukisele u bva kha CollectionFS u ya kha vhuṅwe Vhuvhulungo naho vhufhio.
s3-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-AWS S3 noma i-MiniO ukuze ugcine ifayela
s3-endpoint-description: I-URL yephoyinti lokugcina le-S3 (isb., s3.amazonaws.com noma i-minio.example.com)
writable-path-description: Indlela eyisisekelo yohlu lwemibhalo yokugcina ifayela
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Yenza ukuhlola okuphelele nokulungiswa kobuqotho bedatha yebhodi, okuhlanganisa ukuhleleka kohlu, ukuma kwamakhadi, nesakhiwo sokubhukuda.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Isusa ngokuphephile izinhlu eziyimpinda ezingenalutho. Isusa kuphela izinhlu ezingenawo amakhadi FUTHI ibe nolunye uhlu olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Ithola futhi ibuyisele amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Idala indlela yokubhukuda 'Yamakhadi Alahlekile' ukuze wenze zonke izinto ezilahlekile zibonakale futhi.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Ibuyisela zonke izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi. Ilungisa ngokuzenzakalelayo noma iyiphi i-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId ukuze wenze izinto zibonakale.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Ithola futhi ilungise uhlu olulahlekile noma olonakele esakhiweni sebhodi.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele futhi alungise izithenjwa eziphukile ze-avatar.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza wonke ama-URL ananyathiselwe ifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze asebenzise isipele esilungile sesitoreji futhi alungise izithenjwa zefayela eziphukile.
migrations-admin-only: Abaphathi bebhodi kuphela abangasebenzisa ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migrations-description: Yenza ukuhlolwa kobuqotho bedatha nokulungiswa kwaleli bhodi. Ukuthutha ngakunye kungenziwa ngakunye.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthutha okuphelele ukuze kuhlolwe futhi kulungiswe ubuqotho bedatha yebhodi. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana. Qhubeka?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Lokhu kuzoqale kuguqule noma iluphi uhlu olwabiwe lube uhlu lokubhukuda ngakunye, bese kusula uhlu olungenalutho olunohlu oluyimpinda olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi. Uhlu olungenalutho olungadingeki ngempela kuphela oluzosuswa. Qhubeka?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzodala indlela yokubhukuda ethi 'Amakhadi Alahlekile' futhi kubuyisele wonke amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Lokhu kuthinta kuphela izinto ezingagciniwe. Qhubeka?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Lokhu kuzobuyisela ZONKE izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi, kuzenze zibonakale futhi. Noma yiziphi izinto ezinomazisi abangekho zizolungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lokhu akukwazi ukuhlehliswa kalula. Qhubeka?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzothola futhi kulungise izinhlu ezingekho noma ezonakele esakhiweni sebhodi. Qhubeka?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele. Qhubeka?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza wonke ama-URL okunamathiselwe kwifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze kusetshenziswe isipele esilungile sesitoreji. Qhubeka?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Awekho ama-swimlanes alahlekile, izinhlu, noma amakhadi azobuyiselwa
migration-progress-note: Sicela ulinde ngenkathi sithuthela ibhodi lakho esakhiweni sakamuva...
conversion-info-text: Lokhu kuguqulwa kwenziwa kanye ebhodini ngalinye futhi kuthuthukisa ukusebenza. Ungaqhubeka nokusebenzisa ibhodi ngokujwayelekile.
converting-board-description: Ukuguqula isakhiwo sebhodi ukuze kusebenze okuthuthukisiwe. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana.
migration-batch-size-description: Inani lezinanyathiselwa okufanele zicutshungulwe eqeqebeni ngalinye (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Misa isikhashana ukuthutha lapho ukusetshenziswa kwe-CPU kudlula leli phesenti (10-90)
migration-info-text: Ukuthutha kwesizindalwazi kwenziwa kanye futhi kuthuthukise ukusebenza kwesistimu. Inqubo iyaqhubeka ngemuva ngisho noma uvala isiphequluli sakho.
migration-resume-failed: Yehlulekile ukuqalisa kabusha ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migration-warning-text: Sicela ungasivali isiphequluli sakho ngesikhathi sokuthutha. Inqubo izoqhubeka ngemuva kodwa ingase ithathe isikhathi eside ukuqeda.
account-locked: I-akhawunti ikhiyiwe okwesikhashana ngenxa yemizamo eminingi ehlulekile yokungena ngemvume. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
username-too-short: Igama lomsebenzisi kufanele okungenani libe nezinhlamvu ezi-3
problems-summary-help: Swaya zwipiḓa zwa vhuleme zwe na zwi sedzulusa, nga murahu ni puṱedze Ṱanganedza u itela u vhuyisela mbalo ya vhuleme vhuswa.
